name.ja: <ruby>Ｄ－ＨＥＲＯ<rt>デステニーヒーロー</rt></ruby> デスドグマガイ
name.zh-CN: 命运－英雄 死亡教义魔侠

text.en: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand or GY) by banishing 3 Warrior and/or DARK monsters from your GY. You can only Special Summon "Destiny HERO - Death Dogma" once per turn this way. If Summoned this way: You can activate this effect; inflict 2000 damage to your opponent during the next Standby Phase. Once per turn, when your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect): You can Fusion Summon 1 DARK or Warrior Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by shuffling its materials from your hand, field, and/or GY into the Deck.
text.zh-CN: 此卡不可通常召唤。“命运－英雄 死亡教义魔侠”1回合1次，仅可在从自己墓地将合计3只战士族或暗属性怪兽除外的情况下，从手牌・墓地特殊召唤。①：此卡以此方法特殊召唤的情况下可以发动。在下个准备阶段给予对手2000伤害。②：1回合1次，对手发动效果时可以发动。将自己手牌・场上・墓地的怪兽作为融合素材放回牌组，将1只战士族或暗属性的融合怪兽融合召唤。
